title: How Agentic AI Is Transforming Customer Service and Contact Centers
summary: Agentic AI is automating customer service workflows in contact centers. Developers should explore building autonomous AI agents for support pipelines. Key takeaway: integrate agentic patterns early.

title: The IBM Study And The S&P 500 Are Lying To You About AI
summary: The article challenges hype around AI adoption studies and S&P 500 AI narratives, arguing they overstate real-world impact. Developers should validate AI ROI claims independently.

title: Difference Between OEM, Retail, and Volume Licenses
summary: This article explains differences between OEM, Retail, and Volume Microsoft licenses. Developers should choose licenses matching deployment needs. Volume licenses offer best flexibility for dev environments.

title: AI Didn’t Kill Creativity. It Exposed Weak Thinking.
summary: The article argues AI reveals rather than replaces shallow thinking. Developers who rely on rote patterns are most exposed. Invest in critical thinking and problem-framing skills.

title: Why Scalable Web Applications Fail Without Proper Architecture
summary: Article discusses how scalable web apps fail due to poor architecture choices. Matters because devs often scale prematurely or skip foundational design. **Key takeaway:** Invest in architecture patterns early—refactoring at scale is costly.
